config.script:
"""
		Written By: Sagar Iparkar
		Written Date: 27/05/2024
		Purpose: Check user authenticated or not, if not then navigate to login oage. 
	"""
	try:
	#start of try block
		previousPage = self.session.custom.IsLoggedIn
		if not previousPage:
			system.perspective.navigate('/')
		else:
			self.session.custom.TopViewHeader = "Washing Machine"
			if self.session.custom.showSingleView:
				system.perspective.alterDock('Nav', {'handle':'hide'})
				system.perspective.closeDock('Nav')

	#End of try block
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='WashingMachine'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Order/WashingMachine')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onStartup  -> WashingMachine')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

"""
		Written By: Sagar Iparkar
		Written Date: 27/05/2024
		Purpose: Show up and down arrows for Released orders
	"""
	selectedRow = self.props.selection.data
	self.custom.selectedRowIndex = self.props.selection.selectedRow
	for data in	selectedRow:
		if data['Status'] == 'Released':
			self.parent.parent.getChild("cntAction").getChild("imgUp").meta.visible = True
			self.parent.parent.getChild("cntAction").getChild("imgDown").meta.visible = True
			self.custom.selectedRow = selectedRow
		else:
			self.parent.parent.getChild("cntAction").getChild("imgUp").meta.visible = False
			self.parent.parent.getChild("cntAction").getChild("imgDown").meta.visible = False

transforms.code:
variable = '''
    DECLARE
    	@MST_Area_Id INT = ''' + str(value) + ''',
		@WorkStationName varchar(50) = ''' + "'" + str(self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation) + "'" + '''; -- PartNumbers and AlternatePartNumbers Changes 02/07/2025
	
	BEGIN
	DECLARE @PRODUCTION_ORDER TABLE (
	        order_number VARCHAR(200),
	        serial_number NVARCHAR(200),
	        M_BOMNumber VARCHAR(50),
	        Description VARCHAR(200),
	        OrderStatusid INT,
	        OrderStatus VARCHAR(50),
	        order_category VARCHAR(255),
	        m_BOM_id INT,
	        MST_Area_Id INT,
	        MST_Event_Id INT,
	        special_instruction VARCHAR(255),
	        id INT,
	        ActionT INT,
	        psn INT,
	        RowIndex INT
	    );
	
	    INSERT INTO @PRODUCTION_ORDER
	    SELECT 
	        PO.order_number,
	        ISNULL(PO.serial_number, '') AS serial_number,
	        MB.M_BOMNumber,
	        MB.Description,
	        POS.OrderStatusid,
	        POS.OrderStatus,
	        PO.order_category,
	        PO.m_BOM_id,
	        PO.MST_Area_Id,
	        SE.MST_Event_Id,
	        ISNULL(PO.special_instruction, '') AS special_instruction,
	        PO.id,
	        0 AS ActionT,
	        PO.psn,
	        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY psn) AS RowIndex
	    FROM PRODUCTION_ORDER PO WITH(NOLOCK)
	    INNER JOIN M_BOM MB WITH(NOLOCK) ON PO.m_BOM_id = MB.m_BOM_id
	    INNER JOIN MST_Production_OrderStatus POS WITH(NOLOCK) 
	        ON POS.OrderStatusid = PO.OrderStatusid AND POS.OrderStatusid IN (2, 4, 6)
	    LEFT OUTER JOIN TRN_Station_Events SE WITH(NOLOCK) 
	        ON SE.SerialNumber = PO.serial_number
	    WHERE (SE.MST_Event_Id <> 5 OR SE.MST_Event_Id IS NULL)
	        AND PO.IsWashingMachineStatus = 0
	        AND PO.MST_Area_Id = @MST_Area_Id
	    ORDER BY PO.psn;
	
	    IF EXISTS (SELECT TOP 1 1 FROM @PRODUCTION_ORDER WHERE OrderStatusid = 6)
	    BEGIN
	        UPDATE @PRODUCTION_ORDER
	        SET ActionT = 2
	        WHERE OrderStatusid = 6;
	
	        UPDATE @PRODUCTION_ORDER
	        SET ActionT = 0
	        WHERE OrderStatusid <> 6;
	    END
	    ELSE IF EXISTS (SELECT TOP 1 1 FROM @PRODUCTION_ORDER WHERE OrderStatusid = 4)
	    BEGIN
	        UPDATE @PRODUCTION_ORDER
	        SET ActionT = 1
	        WHERE OrderStatusid = 4 and RowIndex = 1;
	
	        UPDATE @PRODUCTION_ORDER
	        SET ActionT = 0
	        WHERE OrderStatusid <> 4 and RowIndex <> 1;
	    END
	    
	     -- PartNumbers and AlternatePartNumbers Changes 02/07/2025
	    
		DECLARE @IswashingMachineFlag INT;
		SET @isWashingMachineFlag = 
			CASE
				WHEN @WorkStationName = 'LAD10' THEN 3 -- Legacy DH Line
				WHEN @WorkStationName = 'TAWM02' THEN 4 -- Titan Main Line
			END;
		
			DECLARE @AltParts TABLE (
			M_BOM_Id INT,
			PartNumbers NVARCHAR(MAX),
			AlternatePartNumbers NVARCHAR(MAX)
		);
	
		-- Step 1: Part Numbers
		WITH DistinctParts AS (
			SELECT DISTINCT EP.M_BOM_Id, MM.M_MaterialNumber
			FROM TRN_ErrorProof EP
			JOIN M_Material MM ON MM.M_Material_Id = EP.M_Material_Id
			WHERE EP.IsActive = 1
			  AND EP.IsDeleted = 0
			  AND EP.isWashingMachine = @isWashingMachineFlag
			  AND EP.MST_Area_Id = @MST_Area_Id
			  AND (EP.M_BOM_Id IN (SELECT DISTINCT m_BOM_id FROM @PRODUCTION_ORDER) OR EP.M_BOM_Id IS NULL)
		)
		SELECT 
			M_BOM_Id,
			STRING_AGG(M_MaterialNumber, ', ') AS PartNumbers
		INTO #PartNumbers
		FROM DistinctParts
		GROUP BY M_BOM_Id;
	
		-- Step 2: Alternate Parts
		WITH DistinctAltParts AS (
			SELECT DISTINCT EP.M_BOM_Id, ALT.M_MaterialNumber
			FROM TRN_ErrorProof EP
			CROSS APPLY STRING_SPLIT(EP.ALTERNATEPART, ',') AS Split
			JOIN M_Material ALT ON ALT.M_Material_Id = TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(Split.value)) AS INT)
			WHERE EP.IsActive = 1
			  AND EP.IsDeleted = 0
			  AND EP.isWashingMachine = @isWashingMachineFlag
			  AND EP.MST_Area_Id = @MST_Area_Id
			  AND (EP.M_BOM_Id IN (SELECT DISTINCT m_BOM_id FROM @PRODUCTION_ORDER) OR EP.M_BOM_Id IS NULL)
		)
		SELECT 
			M_BOM_Id,
			STRING_AGG(M_MaterialNumber, ', ') AS AlternatePartNumbers
		INTO #AltPartNumbers
		FROM DistinctAltParts
		GROUP BY M_BOM_Id;
	
		-- Step 3: Merge
		INSERT INTO @AltParts (M_BOM_Id, PartNumbers, AlternatePartNumbers)
		SELECT 
			COALESCE(p.M_BOM_Id, a.M_BOM_Id),
			p.PartNumbers,
			a.AlternatePartNumbers
		FROM #PartNumbers p
		FULL OUTER JOIN #AltPartNumbers a ON p.M_BOM_Id = a.M_BOM_Id;
	
		DROP TABLE #PartNumbers;
		DROP TABLE #AltPartNumbers;
	
	
	
	    -- Final select with row index
		SELECT 
			PO.*,
			AP.PartNumbers,
			AP.AlternatePartNumbers
		FROM @PRODUCTION_ORDER PO
		LEFT JOIN @AltParts AP ON AP.M_BOM_Id = PO.m_BOM_id  -- PartNumbers and AlternatePartNumbers Changes 02/07/2025
		ORDER BY PO.psn;
		END	
	'''
	return system.db.runPrepQuery(variable)

messageHandlers.script:
# implement your handler here
	system.perspective.print("Message Handler call--RefreshWashingMachineData")
	self.refreshBinding("props.data")

# implement your handler here
	system.perspective.print("Message Handler called from OrderRefreshOrderMgmt")
	self.refreshBinding("props.data")
